title: Frontend Engineer
description: We are looking for a web frontend engineer to join PayPay. You will be building features that change how people in Japan use and manage their finances and business. As a fast-paced company leading the payments industry, we need our engineers to be versatile and enthusiastic to take on new challenges in order to stay at the forefront.
ai_summary: PayPayでは、ハイブリッド勤務のフロントエンドエンジニアを募集しています。日本の人々の財務管理に影響を与える機能を開発し、急成長する決済業界で新たな挑戦に取り組む意欲的なエンジニアを求めています。応募要件や勤務条件は記載されていません。

title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Principal Software Engineer to work on our various systems which need high scalability, reliability and availability. These challenges require creative thinking and a deep understanding of how software and platform work.
Our ideal candidate is an ace problem solver and a learner at heart. You should have a very high degree of comfort in a programming language of your choice. We offer a flexible work schedule and you get your choice of tools (both hardware and software) and most importantly, the opportunity to work on tough problems with the brightest minds around you. So, if challenges excite you, and you're ready for a big one, let us know.
Responsibilities:
Design, develop, test, deploy, maintain and improve software and core platform Lead technical aspects for multiple projects through hands-on execution and guidance of other engineers Provide architectural blueprints and technical leadership. Provides input and guidance during all phases of programs to solve challenging technical issues. Build common platforms to support different business vertical application systems Develop tools and contribute to open source wherever possible Adopt problem-solving as a way of life – always go to the root cause!
Experience:
Solid foundation in designing, implementing, and maintaining a large-scale distributed system. Experience in developing distributed platform systems such as Messaging Platforms, Pub/Sub Systems, Databases, Distributed Computing Frameworks, and Schedulers.
Tech Stack:
Our technology stack may vary based on project needs. Currently, we utilize:
Programming Languages: Java, Kotlin, Scala Frameworks and Tools: Spring Boot, JUnit, Resilience4j, Feign Databases: MySQL/AuroraDB, DynamoDB, ELK, Kafka, Redis, TiDB Deployment and Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, AWS, GCP Development Tools: GitHub, IntelliJ, Gradle, Maven, npm/yarn, Flyway, Jenkins Data Analytics: BigQuery, Kibana, Spark Diagramming Tools: PlantUML, draw.io , miro.com Communication: Slack, Zoom
Qualifications:
Degree in Computer Engineering or Computer Science or 7+ years equivalent experience in software development Strong fundamentals in data structure, algorithm, operating system and object-oriented programming Deep understanding of concurrency, distributed computing, large-scale system, messaging and algorithm Software development experience in one or more general-purpose programming languages Interest and ability to learn new technology stacks as needed
Preferred Qualifications:
Experience in working for system development in finance, payment, or similar industries Experience with AWS services Contribute to open-source projects Language ability in Japanese and English is a plus (We have a professional translator but it is nice to have language skills)
Portrait:
Experience: Demonstrated experience designing and implementing large scale, high performance, micro-service based architectures utilizing new concepts and technologies where appropriate. Ownership: A mentoring approach to owning, managing and improving the technical aspects of a large scale system end to end. Communication : The ability to clearly and logically communicate your choice of technology and architectural decision based on its implementation strengths and limitations. Commitment : As a professional, commit to the growth and business goals of the organization and create impactful results by your ownership. Curiosity: Foster a development culture that explores new ideas knowing that we learn even from the ones that fail.
ai_summary: ハイブリッド勤務のPrincipal Software Engineerを募集しています。大規模で信頼性の高いシステムの設計、開発、保守を担当し、他のエンジニアへの指導も行います。応募者は、プログラミング言語に精通し、分散システムやマイクロサービスアーキテクチャの経験が求められます。

title: Cloud Platform Engineer (DB Specialist)
description:
We are working to provide the best financial services to users in Japan. We empower PayPay product by realizing efficient, stable and optimized storage services. PayPay is looking for Cloud Platform Engineers who specialize in databases at scale on mission critical systems.
Main Responsibilities
Database operations, including monitoring, configuration management, upgrade, scaling, backup, and data migration. Iterate on database operations to improve quality and efficiency Troubleshoot stability and performance problems Contribute to documentation for communicating knowledge, experience and for effective decision-making Research and test new tools in database ecosystems, and adopt them in PayPay Group.
qualifications: More than 5 years of DBA experience with a minimum of 3 years MySQL or PostgreSQL experience. More than 3 years of AWS experience in recent years Hands-on experience with Infra as Code (IaC - terraform) Interested in new technologies and willing to improve operational quality and efficiency Familiar with shell and programming language for scripting(Python, Go,...)
ai_summary: PayPayでは、データベースの運用を専門とするCloud Platform Engineerを募集しています。応募者は、5年以上のDBA経験と3年以上のMySQLまたはPostgreSQL経験が必要で、AWSやInfra as Code（Terraform）の実務経験も求められます。勤務地はハイブリッドで、新技術に興味があり、運用の質と効率を向上させる意欲がある方を歓迎します。

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description: PayPay is looking for a Cloud Platform Engineer for PayPay's Cloud Based payment system. This role will be responsible for the engineering of Cloud Infrastructure Platforms to provide robust, reliable and cost-efficient Platform so that we can deliver the best experience for our growing customers base.
qualifications: More than 5 years of technical and architectural experience in AWS-based infrastructure platforms Extensive technical hands-on experience with computing, networking, storage, and analytical services on Latest AWS Services Experience with Terraform based infrastructure as code (IAC) on AWS Experience in production level infrastructure change management and releases for high traffic & business-critical systems Experience in Cloud infrastructure and platform systems availability, performance and cost management Experience as an AWS administrator, including Multi AWS organization management, managing 50+ AWS accounts and 100+ users Strong understanding of cloud security best practices in Fintech Industry Demonstrated skill in programming and scripting languages, including Python, Shell Scripting, Go, and Rust Excellent oral, written, and interpersonal communication skills Proficiency in either English or Japanese
ai_summary: PayPayでは、クラウドベースの決済システムのためのCloud Platform Engineerを募集しています。応募者は、AWSを基盤としたインフラの設計・運用に5年以上の経験が必要で、Terraformを用いたインフラ管理やクラウドセキュリティの知識も求められます。勤務地はハイブリッドで、英語または日本語のコミュニケーション能力が必要です。

title: Backend Engineer
description: PayPay is looking for a Backend Engineer to work on our payment system to deliver the best payment experience for our customers.
qualifications: 4+ years of experience in using Java under professional environment, or if you are non-Java user, excellent skills in generalized programming languages, such as Scala, Python, and Go. Interest and ability to learn other coding languages as needed. Experience with NoSQL databases and distributed cache. Strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms and object-oriented programming. In-depth understanding of concurrency and distributed computing. Degree in Computer Engineering or Computer Science or 5+ years equivalent experience in SaaS platform development. Business level of English or Japanese. Hands-on experience with AI/LLM tools (e.g., ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, CodeWhisperer, or similar) in professional software development.
ai_summary: PayPayでは、ハイブリッド勤務のBackend Engineerを募集しています。応募者は、Javaまたは他のプログラミング言語（Scala、Python、Go）の実務経験が4年以上あり、NoSQLデータベースや分散キャッシュの経験が求められます。コンピュータ工学またはコンピュータサイエンスの学位、またはSaaSプラットフォーム開発での5年以上の経験が必要で、ビジネスレベルの英語または日本語能力が求められます。
